feature.name: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 validation core
feature.description: Extract jsonschema's core Draft 2020-12 validation behavior for common schema constraints and structured errors.
included_behaviors: validate object, array, string, integer, number, boolean, and null types
support required, properties, additionalProperties, minimum, minLength, pattern, enum, anyOf, oneOf, and allOf
iterate ValidationError objects with path, schema_path, validator, validator_value, and message
perform format validation when a FormatChecker is provided
validate schemas and raise SchemaError for invalid schemas

entanglement.description: Validator behavior is coupled to validator class construction, format checking registries, error trees, and keyword handlers.

output.import: from featurelifted import Draft202012Validator, validate, ValidationError, SchemaError, FormatChecker
